metadata.name: Set Up a Recurring Billing Schedule

description: A new customer has signed up for a monthly subscription service. AR needs to set them up on a recurring billing schedule.

nodes.task_description: Receive the new customer contract with the subscription details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the contract specifying a $500 monthly fee.

nodes.task_description: Create a recurring billing plan in the ERP system for the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sets up a plan to automatically generate a $500 invoice on the 1st of each month.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the schedule is active and the first invoice will be generated on the correct date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the setup in the system.
